name: Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornstarch with 1/2 cup milk until smooth.
2. Gradually add an additional 1 1/2 cups milk and cook over very low heat until thick and smooth, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
3. Blend sugar, eggs, salt, and evaporated milk in an electric mixer bowl.
4. Add the hot cornstarch mixture and beat well.
5. Incorporate whipping cream, remaining 4 cups milk, chocolate, and vanilla.
6. Pour into a gallon electric or hand-crank freezer.
7. Churn and freeze according to manufacturer's directions until firm.
8. Carefully remove the paddle.
9. Seal the ice cream container well.
10. Fill the ice cream freezer with crushed ice and ice cream salt. Cover tightly and set aside several hours for the ice cream to season, or spoon into another chilled container and store in the home freezer to season.
Makes about 1 gallon
